zh.Najera, La Rioja, Spain: 西班牙拉 利奧亞納拉
zh.Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, England: 英國斯塔福爾哈特利 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Stafford於大約1338年出生在英國英格蘭時，她的父親Sir Ralph Stafford38歲，母親Margaret de Audley29歲。她於1347年5月12日與Fulk le Strange 3rd Lord Strange of Blackmere在英國史洛普爾其其結婚。她去世於1376年8月7日在英國斯塔福爾哈特利 卡素享年39歲，埋葬在英國素瑞令費爾德。

zh-hans.Najera, La Rioja, Spain: 西班牙拉 利奧亞納拉
zh-hans.Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, England: 英国斯塔福爾哈特利 卡素
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Stafford于大约1338年出生在英国英格兰时，她的父亲Sir Ralph Stafford38岁，母亲Margaret de Audley29岁。她于1347年5月12日与Fulk le Strange 3rd Lord Strange of Blackmere在英国史洛普爾其其结婚。她去世于1376年8月7日在英国斯塔福爾哈特利 卡素享年39岁，埋葬在英国素瑞令費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Stafford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name principally from Stafford (Staffordshire), but occasionally from other places with similar names, such as Stafford House in Ifield (Sussex), possibly East and West Stowford in East Down (Devon), and three minor places in Devon called Stafford, in Dolton, Broadhembury, and Colyton parishes. The places are all named with Old English ford ‘ford’ as the final element, but have different initial elements. The Staffordshire placename has Old English stæth ‘river bank, shore’; Stafford in Colyton (Devon) has Old English stān ‘stone, rock’; the Sussex placename has Old English stēor ‘steer, bullock’; East and West Stowford (Devon) have Old English stæf ‘staff, stave, rod’; Stafford in Dolton and Stafford in Broadhembury (Devon) may have Old English stæth, stān, or stæf.

variants.name: Stocker
meanings: German and Swiss German (also Stöcker): topographic name for someone living by a tree stump (see Stock 3) or an occupational name for a tree cutter, from Middle High German stocken ‘to clear land’.
German and Swiss German (also Stöcker); Dutch: occupational name from Middle High German, Middle Dutch stocker ‘jailer’.

English: occupational name from Middle English stokker ‘one who sells stockfish’ (fish dried in the air without salt). This was the usual source of the name in medieval London, where a bylaw of 1419 stated that no stokker should board a ship to buy fish (presumably in order to forestall the market).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Stafford was born about 1338, in England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Ralph Stafford, was 38 and her mother, Margaret de Audley, was 29. She married Fulk le Strange 3rd Lord Strange of Blackmere on 12 May 1347, in Whitchurch, Shropshire, England. She died on 7 August 1376, in Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 39, and was buried in Lingfield, Surrey, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Stafford est née environ 1338, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Ralph Stafford, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Audley, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Fulk le Strange 3rd Lord Strange of Blackmere le 12 mai 1347, à Whitchurch, Shropshire, Angleterre. Elle est décédée le 7 août 1376, à Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterrée à Lingfield, Surrey, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Stafford um 1338 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Ralph Stafford 38 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Audley 29. Sie hat am 12. Mai 1347 in Whitchurch, Shropshire, England Fulk le Strange 3rd Lord Strange of Blackmere geheiratet. Sie starb am 7. August 1376 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, England und wurde in Lingfield, Surrey, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Stafford è nata il circa 1338 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Ralph Stafford, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Audley, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Fulk le Strange 3rd Lord Strange of Blackmere il 12 maggio 1347, nel Whitchurch, Shropshire, England. Morì il 7 agosto 1376, nel Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolta a Lingfield, Surrey, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Staffordが約1338年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Staffordは38歳，母Margaret de Audleyは29歳であった。1347年5月12日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアウィトチャーチでFulk le Strange 3rd Lord Strange of Blackmereと結婚した。彼女は1376年8月7日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアチャートリー カストルで39歳で死去し，イギリススリーリングフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Stafford(이)가 대략 1338년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Ralph Stafford(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Audley(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1347년 5월 12일 영국 슈럽실르 휘트c후르치에서 Fulk le Strange 3rd Lord Strange of Blackmere(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1376년 8월 7일 영국 스태퍼드실르 처틀리 카스틀에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수리 링필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Stafford nasceu aproximadamente 1338, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Ralph Stafford, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Audley, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Fulk le Strange 3rd Lord Strange of Blackmere em 12 de maio de 1347, em Whitchurch, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Ela faleceu em 7 de agosto de 1376, em Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 39 anos, e foi sepultada em Lingfield, Surrey, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Stafford родилась около 1338 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Ralph Stafford было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Audley, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Fulk le Strange 3rd Lord Strange of Blackmere 12 мая 1347 г. в местности уичурч, шропшир, Англия. Она умерла 7 августа 1376 г. в местности чартли кастл, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 39 лет и была похоронена в местности лингфиелд, сурри, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Stafford nació aproximadamente 1338, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Ralph Stafford, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Margaret de Audley, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Fulk le Strange 3rd Lord Strange of Blackmere el 12 de mayo de 1347, en Whitchurch, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Murió el 7 de agosto de 1376, en Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultada en Lingfield, Surrey, Inglaterra.
